response.justification: Bogdan has strong full-stack experience and notable geospatial contributions via GISCollective, but lacks direct C++/Rust experience in routing, navigation, or distributed data pipelines — critical for this role. His DLang and Node.js work shows systems thinking, but the required low-level systems and geospatial routing expertise are not sufficiently demonstrated or aligned with the job's core technical demands.
strengths: Demonstrated geospatial project experience via open-source GISCollective
Strong systems-level programming background with DLang and asynchronous I/O
Proven ability to work across full stack and learn new technologies rapidly
concerns: No evidence of modern C++ or Rust in production routing or map tile systems
Lacks explicit experience with routing data pipelines, traffic integration, or navigation QA
Primary tech stack (TypeScript, Node.js, DLang) diverges from core requirement of C++
